content.json:
# Sign-in Risk & Conditional Access Gaps
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1078 Valid Accounts · T1556 Modify Authentication Process

**Data source:** `SigninLogs` (`ConditionalAccessStatus`, `RiskLevelDuringSignIn`, `AuthenticationRequirement`, `ClientAppUsed`).

> Surfaces where Conditional Access did NOT apply, where MFA was not required, and where legacy auth slipped through — the gaps an attacker abuses.

content.query: SigninLogs | summarize Count=count() by ConditionalAccessStatus | render piechart
content.title: Conditional Access status distribution

content.query: SigninLogs | where ConditionalAccessStatus == 'notApplied' and ResultType == 0 | summarize Count=count() by UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName | top 100 by Count desc
content.title: Successful sign-ins with NO Conditional Access applied

content.query: SigninLogs | where AuthenticationRequirement == 'singleFactorAuthentication' and ResultType == 0 | summarize Count=count() by UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName, ClientAppUsed | top 100 by Count desc
content.title: Single-factor (no MFA) successful sign-ins — T1556

content.query: SigninLogs | extend Risk=tostring(RiskLevelDuringSignIn) | where isnotempty(Risk) and Risk != 'none' | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated,1d), Risk | render columnchart
content.title: Risk level trend
